articles.title: Lionel Messi Scores To Go Clear In FIFA World Cup 2026 Golden Boot Race, Extends All
articles.excerpt: Lionel Messi bounced back from a first-half penalty miss with a goal and an assist as Argentina rallied from two goals down to beat Egypt 3-2, moving the captain to the top of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Golden Boot standing
articles.summary: After seeing a first-half penalty saved, Lionel Messi sparked Argentina's comeback with an assist and a goal against Egypt, moving to the top of the Golden Boot standings while extending his FIFA World Cup scoring record

articles.title: US stocks today: S&P 500 ends down as AI worries hit chipmakers

articles.title: Argentina vs Egypt Highlights: Lionel Messi Inspires Stunning Comeback As Defending Champions Reach World Cup Quarter

articles.title: Kusumgar raises  ₹194 crore from anchor investors ahead of IPO opening tomorrow
articles.excerpt: Kusumgar Limited has raised ₹193.9 crore from anchor investors for its IPO, allocating 4,628,877 shares at ₹419 each. The IPO opens on July 8, 2026, and is an Offer for Sale of 1.55 crore shares, totaling ₹650 crore.
articles.summary: Kusumgar Limited has raised ₹193.9 crore from anchor investors for its IPO, allocating 4,628,877 shares at ₹419 each. The IPO opens on July 8, 2026, and is an Offer for Sale of 1.55 crore shares, totaling ₹650 crore.
